div.style: display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; margin-bottom:0px; font-size:12px; white-space:nowrap;

field.name: help
field.p: Create a Quotation, the first step of a new sale.
Once the quotation is confirmed, it becomes a sales order. You'll be able to invoice it and collect payments. From the Sales Orders menu, you can track delivery orders or services.

field.name: help
field.p: Create a Quote Builder, the first step of a new sale.
Once the quotation is confirmed, it becomes a Travel Package. You'll be able to invoice it and collect payments. From the Travel Packages menu, you can track delivery orders or services.

record.field: Automatic Send SMS Of Thank You
